text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At the training track after a day of heavy rain...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I tripped and fell straight into a puddle on my
way here...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! And I'd even hyped myself up to make sure I
wouldn't let the rain get me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I think I've lost all my
motivation...
